Number System.question: What is the place value of 7 in the number 47,358?
Which is the smallest prime number?
What is the LCM of 12 and 18?
Which of the following is a composite number?
What is the square root of 144?
If a number is divisible by both 2 and 3, it is also divisible by:

Percentage.question: If 20% of a number is 40, find the number.
A shop offers 15% discount on a Rs. 2000 laptop. What is the discount amount?
If the price of sugar increases from Rs. 30 to Rs. 36 per kg, what is the percentage increase?
In an exam, a student scored 180 out of 200. What is the percentage?

Profit & Loss.question: A shopkeeper buys an article for Rs. 200 and sells for Rs. 250. Find the profit.
A man buys a bicycle for Rs. 1500 and sells it for Rs. 1200. Find the loss.
Find the profit percent if cost price is Rs. 80 and selling price is Rs. 100.
A shopkeeper sells an article for Rs. 540 at a loss of 10%. Find the cost price.
If an article is sold for Rs. 882 at a profit of 14%, find the cost price.
A merchant offers 20% discount on the marked price of Rs. 500. What is the selling price?
Find the marked price if selling price is Rs. 384 after a 20% discount.
A seller sells two items at Rs. 500 each. On one item he gains 25%, on the other he loses 25%. Find his total profit or loss.
If the cost price of 10 pens is equal to the selling price of 15 pens, find the loss percent.
A dealer sells an article at a profit of 20%. If he had bought it at 10% less and sold it at Rs. 20 less, he would have made a profit of 40%. Find the cost price.

Ratio & Proportion.question: The ratio of 45 minutes to 1 hour is:
If A:B = 3:4 and B:C = 4:7, then A:C is:
If x:y = 5:7, find the value of (3x + 4y) : (4x + 3y).
A man covers 315 km in 7 hours. At the same speed, how far will he cover in 5 hours?
If 12 workers can build a wall in 18 days, how many workers are needed to build it in 12 days?
Find the mean proportion between 9 and 16.
If a:b = 2:3 and b:c = 5:6, find a:b:c.
The ratio of the number of boys to girls in a school is 7:5. If there are 240 boys, how many girls are there?

Time & Work.question: If 6 men can complete a work in 15 days, how many days will 10 men take?
A work can be done in 20 days by 10 workers. How many workers are needed to complete it in 8 days?
If A can complete a work in 10 days and B in 15 days, how many days will they take working together?
If 5 workers can build a wall in 12 days, how many days will 20 workers take?
A can do a work in 8 days and B in 12 days. How long will they take if B leaves after 3 days?
If 3 men or 5 women can complete a work in 20 days, how long will 5 men and 3 women take?
A tap fills a tank in 12 hours. Another tap empties it in 20 hours. In how many hours will the tank be filled if both are opened together?
If 15 workers can complete a project in 45 days, how many workers should be added to complete it in 25 days?
A work which 4 men and 6 women can complete in 10 days is done by 6 men and 10 women. How many days will it take?
If 8 children can do a task in 6 days, how many days will 12 children take?

Time & Distance.question: A car travels 240 km in 4 hours. What is its speed?
A train covers 360 km at a speed of 60 km/h. How long does it take?
A man walks at 5 km/h. How far will he walk in 3 hours?
A cyclist covers 48 km in 4 hours. What is his speed?
A car travels from A to B at 70 km/h and returns at 50 km/h. What is the average speed?
If a train 200 m long passes a pole in 20 seconds, find its speed in km/h.
Two trains 150 m and 100 m long are running at speeds of 40 km/h and 30 km/h respectively in opposite directions. Find the time taken to cross each other.
A man covers half the distance at 30 km/h and the other half at 20 km/h. What is his average speed?
A bus leaves at 8:00 AM and reaches its destination 300 km away at 2:00 PM. What is its average speed?
If a car covers 180 km in 3 hours and then 220 km in 2 hours, what is its average speed?

Average.question: The average of 7 numbers is 15. If one number is 12, find the average of the remaining 6 numbers.
The average age of 4 boys is 12 years. If one boy is 10 years old, find the average age of the remaining 3 boys.
The average of 20 numbers is 35. If one number 45 is replaced by 25, what is the new average?
Find the average of first 10 natural numbers.
The average of 5 consecutive numbers is 20. Find the numbers.
A student scored 70, 80, 85, 90 and 95 in 5 subjects. What is his average score?
The average of 9 numbers is 50. The average of first 5 numbers is 45. Find the average of last 4 numbers.
If the average of 6 numbers is 25 and the average of 4 of them is 20, find the average of the remaining 2 numbers.
The average weight of 8 persons is 60 kg. One person leaves and the average becomes 58 kg. Find the weight of the person who left.

Simple & Compound Interest.question: Find the simple interest on Rs. 500 at 5% per annum for 2 years.
Find the amount on Rs. 2000 at 10% per annum for 2 years (simple interest).
The simple interest on a sum for 3 years at 8% per annum is Rs. 240. Find the sum.
Find compound interest on Rs. 1000 at 10% per annum for 2 years.
Find the amount on Rs. 5000 at 12% p.a. compounded annually for 2 years.
The compound interest on a sum for 2 years at 5% per annum is Rs. 410. Find the sum.
Find simple interest on Rs. 800 at 6% per annum for 5 years.
At what rate will Rs. 500 become Rs. 620 in 3 years (simple interest)?
Find compound interest on Rs. 2000 at 10% p.a. for 3 years (compounded annually).
The difference between compound interest and simple interest on a sum for 2 years at 10% per annum is Rs. 50. Find the sum.

Miscellaneous.question: What is the cube root of 125?
The perimeter of a rectangle is 60 cm. If its length is 20 cm, find its breadth.
Find the area of a circle with radius 7 cm (use π = 22/7).
A train 150 m long passes a platform 250 m long in 20 seconds. Find the speed of the train in m/s.
Find the volume of a cuboid with length 10 cm, breadth 8 cm and height 5 cm.
If x + y = 10 and x - y = 4, find x.
Find the smallest number divisible by 12, 15 and 20.
In a class of 50 students, 30 play cricket and 25 play football. If 10 play both, how many play only cricket?
